fb:
Stop using #construction on your posts. Seriously.

That hashtag has 90 million posts. You’re competing with builders in New York, Dubai and London. Nobody in Kilmarnock is finding you through it.

Use local hashtags instead:
• #AyrshirePlumber
• #KilmarnockBuilder
• #AyrElectrician
• #TroonTrades

Your customers search by location. Your hashtags should too.

#InstagramTip #SocialMediaTips #Ayrshire #SmallBusiness #LocalMarketing #AyrshireTrades #ContentStrategy #Tradespeople #DigitalMarketing #MarketingHelp
